theme: Dark Theme (High-End Financial Cockpit / Performance Pro)

rules: NO teal green or teal blue (#1B93A4) for dashboards.
No full-screen gradients; use matte surfaces with 1px borders.

surfaces_and_borders.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px solid border (border-neutral-800), rounded-md (6px) or rounded-none for sharp technical look. NO soft shadows.
surfaces_and_borders.hover_states: Slight background lightening (bg-neutral-900), border color brightens to border-neutral-700. Explicit text color definitions.
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Used strictly for sticky headers/floating navs. Backdrop-blur-xl, bg-black/80, 1px bottom border border-white/10.
surfaces_and_borders.data_tables: Border-collapse, subtle border-b on rows, highlight row on hover.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense and compact for data, but generous for outer margins (p-6, p-8). Container inside borders MUST have p-6.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Mode B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure heights match (h-full).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Numbers right-aligned. Labels left-aligned. Never center-align paragraphs or dense data.

components.buttons: Sharp edges or rounded-sm, primary buttons are white text on dark gray/black background with 1px border. Interactive hover states required.
components.progress_bars: Prominently used for 'Fondo Emergenza', 'Pensione', 'Debito Zio'. Use solid vivid colors against deep dark tracks (bg-neutral-800).
components.forms: Monthly Recap (5-min form) must use Shadcn forms with custom dark styling, tight inputs, clear keyboard navigation.
components.charts: Recharts. Area, Line, Bar, Donut. Must adapt to dark mode (grid lines #27272A, transparent backgrounds).
components.navigation: Visible sidebar or top nav with clear 3-5 links (Dashboard, Recap, Assets, Debts, AI Analysis). Do not hide behind hamburger on desktop.

visual_enhancers.motion: Minimalist. Micro-interactions for hover/click. Staggered fade-ins for dashboard widgets.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense, professional technical look.
visual_enhancers.textures: Grid backgrounds for the AI Company Analysis section to give it a 'Terminal/Research' feel.

features_implementation_notes.kpi_dashboard: Top row of grid. Net Worth, Emergency Fund, Debt Remaining, Financial Stress Index, PAC Sustainability.
features_implementation_notes.monthly_recap: Dedicated fast-entry form modal or page. Needs Shadcn inputs and 'Save' success toasts (using Sonner).
features_implementation_notes.ai_company_analysis: Input for ticker -> 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' mock analysis view. Use the 'ai_magic' color (#6366F1) for highlights here to differentiate from pure financial data. Use skeleton loaders for the 'analysis in progress' state.
features_implementation_notes.historical_charts: Line charts for Net Worth over time; Bar charts for PAC growth.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 minimum contrast. Use text shadow over any imagery.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-recap-button').

ai_analysis_background.description: Abstract financial numbers on dark screen to be used as a low-opacity background for the AI Analysis loading state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize Recharts for all graphs. Customize tooltips to look premium (dark background, 1px border, tabular nums).
Build the 5-min recap form using React Hook Form + Zod + Shadcn UI.
Design the AI Analysis page to look like an advanced terminal/research report.
Ensure Italian language across the entire UI.
Do NOT add transition: all. Target specific properties.
Install and use Phosphor icons (`yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`).
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all key elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No center-everything layouts.
Create depth with explicit z-index and 1px borders, not heavy drop shadows.
Never use generic AI emojis (🤖🧠💭💡🔮) for icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
Use sonner for all toast notifications.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is strictly forbidden).
